MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT B. HANCOCK OF PACIFIC JUSTICE, TEL. NO. 310-1940 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. WILLIAM A. MOLINSKI OF THE ORRICK, HERRINGTON & SUTCLIFFE LLP, TEL. NO. (213) 612-2256 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT L'OCCITANE, INC. BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF TERESA GRABER, ON BEHALF OF HERSELF, A CLASS OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED, AND THE GENERAL PUBLIC'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Settlement IS GRANTED The waiver of CC 1542 on behalf of class members was addressed in court and modified by the parties; settlement otherwise appears to be roughly within the range of reasonableness. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Curtis Karnow, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 =(302/CK)
